name: SC-02 RAG Q&A — Baseline

parameters.text: Answer the following question using only the information from the knowledge base: What was the total revenue of Acme GmbH in Q2 2024, and which product category contributed the most?

options.systemMessage: You are a Q&A agent. Use the vector_search tool to retrieve relevant information before answering.

parameters.name: vector_search
parameters.description: Search the internal knowledge base for relevant documents. Input: search query string.

_comment: SC-02 Baseline — Standard n8n AI Agent. Vector search simulated via Code Tool (no native ChromaDB integration). Model: gpt-4o-mini.
